mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_system_config ( config_key, config_value, config_type, description, created_at, updated_at, updated_by ) VALUES
( #{item.configKey}, #{item.configValue}, #{item.configType}, #{item.description}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.updatedBy} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), config_type = VALUES(config_type), description = VALUES(description), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_system_config WHERE config_key LIKE CONCAT(#{keyPrefix}, '%') ORDER BY config_key ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM ai_system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT config_value FROM ai_system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT config_value FROM ai_system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT config_value FROM ai_system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT config_value FROM ai_system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
